titleStmt.title: SII 20.304: original edition by G. S. Gai

p.hi: Base of the VinƒÅyaka image set up on the roof of the ma·πá·∏çapa in the Am·πõitƒì≈õvara temple.

summary.p: The record states that the image was got prepared by Malla·πá·πáa and NƒÅkimayya, son of Dhu·πá·∏çadƒìva described as the son of the Thousand Sameya who were the dƒìvaputrakas of god Am·πõitƒì≈õvara of A·πá·πáigere. In characters of about the 12th Century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
